calendar.matters:
Notice Of Lubin Olsons Petition And Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Against William R. Hambrecht, Et Al.
Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER LUBIN OLSON & NIEWIADOMSKI LLP Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Against William R. Hambrecht, et al., is granted. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
